reviews.review_msg: Best prof ever. I had him for Osteology, realized how awesome he was and took 3 other courses with him. I felt that he could be tough but fair. He was extremely helpful with projects if he could tell you took an interest with him as well. I genuinely enjoyed showing up to his classes to hear his jokes and anecdotes. I'm sad to see that he's gone!
One of my favourite profs. Really interesting and gave all questions that were on midterm and test with a few added. If you put in some time, you got great marks.
Good professor. Interesting anecdotes. Clear explanation. Very demanding. Took his biological anthropology class just to have him teach me again.
Although this class was a later class, Mark kept things fairly interesting. Considering, he had limited people to work with(as he posted his lectures on the web) I'd say he did a good job. Fair exams
So boring! Could not pay attention during class due to a drab monotone voice that did not peak my interest whatsoever.
Awesome prof!! Don't need to go to lectures but you should still go since he is so entertaining!  Midterm and Exams are straightforward and simple!

Totally awesome proffs. The one's that leave reviews about favourites are just choking on sour grapes. He doesn't play favourites, he just appreciates it when students take initiative and seek his help on a problem - shows him they are trying.  Also, really entertaining and engaging. The classes are rather hard, but forensics/osteo aren't easy.

He made me hate archaeology. Stay away from this prof if you can. Utter snob and very rude when you approach him for help. Why be a prof if you're going to be a jackass? At least the TA was nice and helpful.

Nice man,but provides no clarity.Must expect TA to do most of this, but doesn't. Take other prof. for osteology if you want a shot at doing well.Says something won't be on a test the next thing it is on the test!

Uncommunicative when it comes to logistics and business of class.Doesn't provide evaluation criteria or learning goals of class.He's quiet and mumbles during lectures. Not very helpful.You're on your own. Hopefully you have a good T.A.The one this semester is very bad and it seems wants you to do poorly.Take another prof. for osteology if you can.
